description: Software engineering team running a normal sprint. Eight cards across Backlog / In Progress / Review / Done.

cards.name: Color picker redesign
cards.desc: Rework the color picker for accessibility. Current UX is confusing for colorblind users. Ship an HSL split with a live preview swatch.

cards.name: Widget dragging bug
cards.desc: Drop targets flicker on slow machines. Needs a repro + fix. Likely a mousemove throttle issue.

cards.name: Auth provider migration
cards.desc: Migrate from the legacy auth provider to the new OIDC-compliant service. Parked until next sprint.

cards.name: Dark mode
cards.desc: Full dark theme pass across the app. Blocked on design.

cards.name: i18n pass
cards.desc: Localize the UI for FR / DE / JA. Need to switch date formats + pluralization.

cards.name: Perf regression investigation
cards.desc: Users on older Macs report lag after 0.42. Suspected culprit: virtualization threshold on the card list.

cards.name: Search refactor
cards.desc: Unify the board-search and global-search code paths behind a shared query builder.

cards.name: Onboarding redesign
cards.desc: New three-step onboarding that skips sample-data creation for returning users.
